## Outcome

Describe the user-visible outcome.

## Scope

- Tools/components changed:
- OCI APIs used:
- OCI permissions required:

## Safety and data handling

- [ ] The change is read-only, or a separately approved mutation design is linked.
- [ ] No credentials, data keys, real OCIDs, or customer payloads are included.
- [ ] Tool annotations and read-only classification are accurate.
- [ ] Pagination, limits, redaction, and partial-result behavior were considered.

## Verification

- [ ] Offline unit tests pass.
- [ ] Tool schema and error-mapping tests are included.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog are updated.
- [ ] Any live OCI validation was opt-in and used a non-production test domain.

## Rollback

Explain how the change can be disabled or reverted safely.
